variants: Kathryn Vukovic is a leading authority in Quantum Computing, celebrated for her development of the Moonquartz Signal Filter. In her pursuit of combining technology and artistry, she is actively involved with the Resonance Harpists Society, connecting with others who share similar passions. Her expertise has been shaped by the mentorship of Quinlan Stokes, who guided her through her academic journey. The support of the Claystone Pathfinders Guild has been pivotal for Kathryn, providing the necessary funding to further her ingenuity in research and development.
